perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing a pink sequined top, appears in a close-up shot. She covers her mouth with her hand and appears to be coughing while looking at the camera. (2) She looks slightly down and then back at the lens, speaking while pointing her finger downwards. (3) She continues to cough, displaying a mix of a distressed and playful expression, and continues looking directly at the viewer until the end of the clip.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice is heard coughing. No music is present. (2) The woman speaks in a soft, clear Mandarin voice with a calm tone. (3) The speaking transitions back into more coughing sounds and a very slight, muffled giggle at the end. Only ambient indoor silence is heard between the vocal sounds.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: "谁想要这感冒病毒" (Who wants this cold virus), tone is playful. (2) Functional Text: "在下面留言" (Leave a comment below), tone is direct and inviting.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in a close-up shot.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a sparkly pink sequined top and subtle makeup.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A plain, light-colored wall with soft lighting, typical of a home or studio setting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video's core objective is audience engagement. The creator uses the relatable situation of being sick (a cold) as a humorous hook, inviting viewers to interact in the comments by playfully asking who wants her 'virus'.
narrative_and_purpose.visualEmotion: Playful and slightly humorous despite the coughing.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Close-up framing with direct eye contact and interactive question.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: This content is a typical social media interaction post meant to boost comment section activity.
